title: Cheese Mod
description: Adds a new use for milk: Cheese!
body: [![Requires Fabric API](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/c7fd18efdadd1c3f12ae56b49afd834640d2d797/assets/cozy/requires/fabric-api_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) This mod adds one simple thing: **Cheese**. You can get Cheese by simply cooking milk. Just put a Milk Bucket in a **Furnace** or **Smoker** and you'll have Cheese in no time. This extends the usage of milk in the vanilla game. It also acts just like drinking a Milk Bucket, which means it clears all your effects if you eat Cheese. It's also quite saturating! ## Smelting Recipe
